title: Senior Software Engineer - Cropin - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cropin - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Cropin invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cropin:
Cropin is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin!
